createTenantText: When you use a software system, you may need to create tenants or tenant accounts. A tenant refers to an organization or individual that exists independently in a software system. When creating a tenant, you will need to provide some basic information, such as an organization name, etc. In general, creating a tenant can help you manage and control multiple organizations or individuals, improve work efficiency, and ensure data security and reliability.
joinTenantText: Adding a tenant means adding an existing tenant to the system. If you are already authorized to access a tenant, you can join it in a few easy steps. First, you need to log in to the system, and then enter the tenant selection interface. Next, you can search for a tenant to join and click the Join button. In general, joining tenants can help you expand your scope of work, improve work efficiency and capabilities.
